[FILE] CONTRIBUTING
[OBJ] Contribution guidelines and PR standards.
[RULES]
1. [REQ] Target: Senior engineers/AI practitioners codifying architectural standards.
2. [REQ] Setup: Fork, clone, branch `feat/...`, run `.\scripts\validate-globals.ps1`.
3. [REQ] Content: `tech-stack/{tech}-{version}.md`. Use `[REQ]`, `[CMD]`, `[PROHIBIT]` tags.
4. [REQ] Examples: Add ❌/✅ code patterns.
5. [REQ] Commits: Conventional Commits (`feat(tech-stack): ...`).
6. [REQ] PR Gates: Pass validation script. Update CHANGELOG. Add code examples.
